title.zh: SQL注入原理分析 - Oracle数据库靶场
title.en: SQL Injection Principle Analysis - Oracle Database Lab

description.zh: 使用Docker搭建Oracle数据库注入测试环境，分析SQL注入原理和 exploitation 技术。
description.en: Use Docker to build Oracle database injection test environment, analyze SQL injection principles and exploitation techniques.

content.zh: Oracle数据库靶场搭建：使用Docker快速部署Oracle XE 11g
content.en: Oracle database lab setup: Use Docker to quickly deploy Oracle XE 11g

codeBlocks.code:
docker pull registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/qida/oracle-xe-11g
docker run -d -p 1521:1521 --name oracle registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/qida/oracle-xe-11g
docker exec -it oracle bash

content.zh: 连接Oracle数据库并创建测试用户
content.en: Connect to Oracle database and create test user
Use sqlplus to connect to database

caption.en: Create test user and grant privileges

content.zh: 创建测试表并插入数据：
content.en: Create test table and insert data:

content.zh: SQL注入原理：用户输入被拼接到SQL语句中执行，导致非授权数据访问。
content.en: SQL injection principle: User input is concatenated into SQL statements for execution, leading to unauthorized data access.
